narrative:
Precinct Fostoria 1-A (precinct in Seneca County) has 905 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
